targets.queryText: SELECT date(started_at) AS day, count(*) AS games FROM games WHERE started_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT date(started_at) AS day, count(*) AS games FROM games WHERE started_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

targets.queryText: SELECT date(g.started_at) AS day, count(DISTINCT p.username) AS players FROM games g JOIN game_players p USING(game_id) WHERE g.started_at IS NOT NULL AND p.is_bot = 0 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT date(g.started_at) AS day, count(DISTINCT p.username) AS players FROM games g JOIN game_players p USING(game_id) WHERE g.started_at IS NOT NULL AND p.is_bot = 0 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

targets.queryText: SELECT count(*) AS returning FROM (SELECT p.username FROM games g JOIN game_players p USING(game_id) WHERE g.started_at IS NOT NULL AND p.is_bot = 0 GROUP BY p.username HAVING count(DISTINCT date(g.started_at)) > 1)
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT count(*) AS returning FROM (SELECT p.username FROM games g JOIN game_players p USING(game_id) WHERE g.started_at IS NOT NULL AND p.is_bot = 0 GROUP BY p.username HAVING count(DISTINCT date(g.started_at)) > 1)

targets.queryText: SELECT round(100.0 * sum(game_over) / count(*), 1) AS pct FROM games WHERE ended_at IS NOT NULL
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT round(100.0 * sum(game_over) / count(*), 1) AS pct FROM games WHERE ended_at IS NOT NULL

targets.queryText: SELECT end_reason, count(*) AS games FROM games WHERE end_reason IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT end_reason, count(*) AS games FROM games WHERE end_reason IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

targets.queryText: SELECT format, count(*) AS games FROM games WHERE format IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT format, count(*) AS games FROM games WHERE format IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

targets.queryText: SELECT commander, count(*) AS picks FROM game_players WHERE commander IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 20
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT commander, count(*) AS picks FROM game_players WHERE commander IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 20

targets.queryText: SELECT deck_name, count(*) AS games FROM game_players WHERE deck_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 20
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT deck_name, count(*) AS games FROM game_players WHERE deck_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 20

targets.queryText: SELECT c.name, sum(c.count) AS copies, count(DISTINCT c.deck_id) AS decks FROM deck_cards c GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 25
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT c.name, sum(c.count) AS copies, count(DISTINCT c.deck_id) AS decks FROM deck_cards c GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 25

targets.queryText: SELECT CAST(duration_s / 300 AS INTEGER) * 5 AS bucket_min, count(*) AS games FROM games WHERE duration_s IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(duration_s / 300 AS INTEGER) * 5 AS bucket_min, count(*) AS games FROM games WHERE duration_s IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

targets.queryText: SELECT CASE is_bot WHEN 1 THEN 'bot' ELSE 'human' END AS seat, count(*) AS seats FROM game_players GROUP BY 1
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CASE is_bot WHEN 1 THEN 'bot' ELSE 'human' END AS seat, count(*) AS seats FROM game_players GROUP BY 1
